reviews.comment:
Solo un playero para atender, colas y colas de vehículos a todas horas, lentísimo, lastima que no hay más que esta estación.

(Translated by Google)
Only one attendant to serve, long lines of vehicles at all hours, incredibly slow, it's a shame there's no other station like this one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyMk1LV0t3EAE

reviews.comment:
De terror.
Las colas para cargar son interminables, cortando hasta el tránsito. No funcionan todos los surtidores y encima hay 2 personas solo con todo.

(Translated by Google)
It's awful. The lines to fill up are endless, even blocking traffic. Not all the pumps are working, and on top of that, there are only two people with everything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaOUl6bzJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
De las peores estaciones de servicio q fui... Hice la cola porque estaba el camion cisterna descargando y cuando estoy por llegar al surtidor respetando mi turno se manda una ranger con un tanque gigante atras para cargar gasoil... Le digo a la playera y se excusa q carga gasoil comun cuando mi vehiculo carga el mismo gasoil. Dan prioridad a amigos... Pesima ypf.

(Translated by Google)
One of the worst gas stations I've ever been to... I waited in line because the tanker truck was unloading, and just as I was about to get to the pump, respecting my turn, a Ford Ranger with a giant tank in the back pulled up to fill up with diesel... I told the attendant, and she made the excuse that she was filling up with regular diesel, even though my vehicle uses the same type. They give priority to friends... YPF is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNabzZTV2VnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me hicieron la pantomima de cargar nafta y me cobraron.
Cuando me di cuenta, era demasiado tarde.
Mucha demora para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
They pretended to fill up my tank and charged me.
By the time I realized what was happening, it was too late. The wait to fill up was terrible.
